candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line near top of income statement; preferable to subtotal-style 'Total Revenue'.
Also represents total revenue, but is a total/subtotal and duplicates Sales in preview.

candidates.row_label: gains on sales of emission rights
candidates.why: Not core revenue; non-operating/other item.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the more direct operating revenue label first, with the subtotal revenue label as fallback if naming changes by year.

candidates.why: Primary direct production/input cost line and best match for cost of goods sold.
Could be part of cost-of-sales in some formats, but appears separate/blank in preview.

candidates.row_label: Own Work Capitalized - Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: Could adjust COGS in some periods, but appears separate/blank and is more of an offset/adjustment.
Related to direct costs but appears blank and less clearly the reported COGS line.
Inventory-related, not clearly an expense line.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the clearest direct cost expense row. Did not add inventory-change/own-work rows because they are separate adjustments and not clearly populated in the preview.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead/personnel expense component.
Clear external service/administrative operating overhead component.
Would be relevant overhead if populated, but appears blank in preview and is less clearly the main reported row.
Dedicated R&D line exists but appears as supplemental/below operating profit in the preview; should not be included in SG&A based on placement rule.
Balance sheet liability/accrual, not an income statement SG&A expense.
Equity reserve, not an income statement expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present among suitable income statement labels. Selected the best overhead components from candidates and excluded D&A, COGS, and below-EBIT supplemental R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label is present. It appears in a supplemental section below operating profit, so it can map to XRD but should not be added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: Mapped the dedicated R&D line to XRD. Because it appears below operating profit in the preview, it was not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on other financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most specific recurring interest expense line; best preferred mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Also a specific interest expense component and useful fallback if reporting changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest and other finance costs, net
candidates.why: Broader net finance cost line; acceptable fallback when a specific interest expense line is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate-style disclosure; less preferable than primary income statement lines.
Balance sheet accrual/liability, not the preferred income statement expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on other financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest and other finance costs, net

variables.notes: Priority list favors the most specific income statement interest expense lines first, with broader net finance costs as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; less preferred because MIB is reported separately.
Only one equity component, not total book equity.
Balancing row, not a reporting line to use.
Balancing row, not a reporting line to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total liabilities and equity, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Selected parent/owner equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with separate MIB mapping.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet label for minority/non-controlling interests.
Equivalent alternate label; useful fallback if naming changes.
Income statement attribution line, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the preferred balance sheet non-controlling interest label first, with synonymous fallback second.
